Thank you!

Call us to order takeout or hear our Peace Special, curry of the day, and soups!

3351 Adams Ave
San Diego, CA 92116

(619) 282-4116

Hours

Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday
11:30 am – 8:30 pm

Wednesday
11:30 am – 3:00 pm

Sunday
9:00 am - 1:00 pm or closed
breakfast buffet 2-3 times a month

Menu

Sunday Breakfast Buffet

About Us

Jyoti-Bihanga is San Diego’s oldest vegetarian restaurant, which opened in 1986. The restaurant is inspired by Sri Chinmoy, a spiritual teacher who devoted his life to creating peace and harmony in the world. At Jyoti-Bihanga, we aspire to create an environment for people to gather, enjoy healthy food, and feel peace within their hearts.
